settings_interface_display.description: Settings section title for interface and display

settings_data_label.description: Label for the data section in settings

settings_import_history.description: Button label to import watch history

settings_import_history_help.message: Import History accepts the watch-history.html file from Google Takeout.
settings_import_history_help.description: Help text for the import history button

settings_import_subs_help.message: Import Subscriptions accepts the subscriptions.csv file from Google Takeout.
settings_import_subs_help.description: Help text for the import subscriptions button

settings_theme_label.description: Label for theme selection in settings

settings_pagination_label.description: Label for pagination count in settings

settings_pagination_help.message: Number of items to show per page (1-100)

settings_overlay_title_label.description: Label for overlay title in settings

settings_overlay_title_help.message: Text shown on viewed videos inside YT re:Watch

settings_overlay_color_label.description: Label for overlay color in settings

settings_overlay_color_help.message: Color used for viewed labels and progress bars inside YT re:Watch

settings_overlay_size_label.description: Label for overlay size in settings

settings_overlay_size_help.message: Size of viewed labels and progress bars inside YT re:Watch

settings_pause_in_playlists_help.message: When playing from a playlist, don't save video progress

settings_export_help.message: Export or import your local history, subscriptions, playlists, settings, and caches

settings_clear_help.message: Clear removes all saved video history (this cannot be undone)
settings_clear_help.description: Help text for the Clear history button

settings_auto_clean_label.description: Label for auto-clean period in settings

settings_auto_clean_help.message: Automatically remove history older than selected period

settings_local_feed_label.description: Label for the local subscriptions feed toggle

settings_local_feed_help.message: Use locally subscribed channels to build the YT re:Watch feed
settings_local_feed_help.description: Help text for the local subscriptions feed toggle

settings_hide_recs_label.description: Label for the hide recommendations toggle

settings_hide_recs_help.message: Hide YouTube's home recommendations and "history is off" nag popups.
settings_hide_recs_help.description: Help text for the hide recommendations toggle

settings_hide_account_label.description: Label for the hide account UI toggle

settings_hide_account_help.message: Hide YouTube's sign-in buttons, account menu, and native Subscribe/Join buttons (your local Subscribe stays).
settings_hide_account_help.description: Help text for the hide account UI toggle

settings_feed_refresh_label.description: Label for the feed refresh interval input

settings_feed_refresh_help.message: How often the local feed checks subscribed channels for new uploads
settings_feed_refresh_help.description: Help text for the feed refresh interval input

subscriptions_refresh.description: Button label to refresh the local subscriptions feed

subscriptions_open_feed.description: Button label to open the dedicated feed page

subscriptions_clear_all.description: Button label to remove all local subscriptions

subscriptions_no_subs.message: No local subscriptions yet. Search in the extension and use Subscribe.
subscriptions_no_subs.description: Empty state for the subscriptions tab

subscriptions_unsubscribe.description: Button label to remove a local subscription

subscriptions_refreshing.description: Refresh button label while a refresh is in progress

subscriptions_refresh_started.message: Refreshing feed in your YouTube tab…
subscriptions_refresh_started.description: Message shown when a feed refresh starts

subscriptions_open_youtube.message: Open a YouTube tab to refresh the feed.
subscriptions_open_youtube.description: Message shown when no YouTube tab is open to refresh the feed

message_settings_saved.description: Generic confirmation that settings were saved
